# Security

If you discover a security issue, please do not open a public issue.

Report it privately by opening a security advisory via the GitHub Advisory feature on the repository:

`https://github.com/stars-labs/bevy-open-arpg/security/advisories/new`

Please include:

- Affected commit/tag and environment (OS / backend / browser).
- Steps to reproduce.
- Impact scope and possible mitigation.

We will respond as soon as possible and publish a fix path in the release notes.
